since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.26%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.36% · BTC +1.07% · Gold -0.47% · Nasdaq100 +0.34%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.26%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.26%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +13.17%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +13.17%, META +6.09%, UEC +3.89%, NVDA +3.56%, AMAT +3.03%. Laggards: OKTA -6.01%, CRWD -5.64%, RXRX -5.58%, S -5.54%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.13% at $148.93
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
